title: Venstone Modpack
description: Minecraft modpack designed for the Venstone minecraft server, the main goal is to improve the Vanilla experience.
body:
# ⛏️ Venstone Modpack - _Be simple._

**Version:** Minecraft 1.21.8 (Fabric)

The main goal is to **improve the Vanilla experience** and make **everything easy for players**.

_Mods are only **client side** and are **designed to be played on the Venstone minecraft server**, however it should work fine on other servers or in singleplayer!_

## What Does the Venstone Modpack Add?

The Venstone Modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience through a curated selection of mods that focus on improving the Vanilla gameplay. Here’s what our modpack adds:

**📈 Performance & Visuals Enhancements:**
- Sodium: _Significantly boosts game performance by optimizing rendering._
- ImmediatelyFast: _Reduces loading times and improves overall game responsiveness._ 
- Iris Shaders: _Enables the use of various shaders to enhance the game’s visuals._
- Not Enough Animations: _Enhances the visual experience of Minecraft by adding more realistic and dynamic animations to player and entity actions._
- Bobby: _Render distance up to 30 chunks+ on servers !_

**⛏️ Quality of Life Features:**
- Shulker Box Tooltip: _Allows you to view the contents of shulker boxes without opening them._
- Mod Menu: _Provides a user-friendly interface to manage installed mods._
- Simple Voice Chat: _Facilitates in-game communication with a built-in voice chat feature._
- Auth Me: _Allows you to switch account easily without restarting the game !_

**🎧 Audio Enhancements:**
- AmbientSounds: _Add immersive environmental and ambient sounds to the game._
- Dynamic Surroundings: _Enhances the audio experience with improved sound effects._
  
**🎨 Ressource Packs:**
- Visual Enchantments  Books: _Every enchantment is now represented by simple and consistent texture changes, so you can identify the attributes of a tool with a simple look._
[View more]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-enchantments](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual_enchantments))
- Vanilla Tweaks: _Fixes graphical bugs_ [View more](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- FreshAnimation: _Gives an animation overhaul to the creatures in the default look of Minecraft. The aim is to make the mobs more dynamic and believable._ [View more](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- Eyeless Fresh Moves: _Better Player Animations_ [View more](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
- Dark-Colorful-Container: _Better vanilla-like containers gui__ [View more](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui)
- Rail Fix


**🌅 Pre-installed Shaders**
- Complementary Shaders Re-imagined

## Gallery ##

**Main menu:** _Edit your settings, mods, packs & shaders easily_
![Main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DuYcvfFq/images/1bb6cdc15d58599cc6979923905ba883c1b09101.png)

**Quick action Inventory:** _Easy commands and emotes_
![Quick action Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DuYcvfFq/images/790ca65b463757fd82a9e5e2162a41bf4573d575.png)

**Render distance & Shaders**
![Render distance & Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DuYcvfFq/images/aa8e70b634d22902203db46b3805f9420be3c869.png)
